outputPreview: Raw review required. Log slice shows persistent SCRIPT ERRORs in .godot_logs\main_game_smoke_stderr_20260309_122557_640.txt: repeated 'Invalid call. Nonexistent function '_update_shader_param' in base 'Nil'' and 'Parse Error: Could not parse global class "EnemyManager" from "res://managers/enemy/Enemy_Manager.gd"', plus 'Compile Error: Failed to compile depended scripts'. Additional files show similar issues (e.g., invalid calls on Nil, preload failures).
